subject: [RFC PATCH v1 2/3] xfs: convert read and buffered write iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-06-25.patch_summary: This patch converts the read and buffered write iomap operations for XFS to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which simplifies the code by removing redundant functions and leveraging the iomap_process helper function. The change does not introduce any functional changes but rather refactors the existing implementation. This is a step towards migrating all XFS iomap operations to use the ->iomap_next() callback.
